candidates.title: Use pnpm consistently in pnpm workspaces
candidates.description: Avoid 'npm install' when pnpm-lock.yaml is present. Enable corepack and use 'pnpm install' locally and in CI.

candidates.title: Harden bash scripts with 'set -euo pipefail'
candidates.description: Ensure shell scripts fail fast and propagate errors. Add an ERR trap for diagnostics.

candidates.title: Validate cron expressions in CI
candidates.description: Add a cron schedule linter/validator for GitHub Actions workflows to prevent misfires.
